name: Oatmeal Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Add cinnamon, cloves, and salt. Stir until combined.
3. Mix in the dark corn syrup.
4. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition until fully blended.
5. Stir in the rolled oats.
6. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 1 hour, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
NOTE: During baking, the oatmeal forms a chewy, "nutty" crust on top. The pie is rich and delicately spiced.
